content: I am so very mad right now, my messages have been unlimited for YEARS. Now suddenly, my unlimited messages have been removed from my possession. I am very disappointed. I liked this App so much because it's so fun and now...are we really back to the olden days? I really hate it so much please bring back the unlimited messages.
こっちは特にいじることなさそう
chatting app but i can't chat🙄
感想あるっす。昔からやっていますけど、楽しかったね。しかしチャットかのアンリミテッドからリミットになってるぜ。今日は最後だ
it's so pathetic to not let people use an app without premium, ew.
全て英語で出されるので読むのに 時間がかかる 良い評価をしている人は全員 サクラと思ったほうがいいと思う その、明らか言語がおかしいしね
We can't even use the app anymore without premium
本当に嫌いです！！数分ごとに広告を見なければならず、AIチャットの利用制限もあまり多くありません！彼
โฆษณาเยอะมาก
全て英語。訳すことも出来ない
広告が他人の作品を勝手に使っていて最悪。
way too many ads and useless updates

This is good and all but i just don't like how it became limited chats and bots again and it only has 70 messages also the reset of it is in 2 hours. Last time it was unlimited without buying premium why did it suddenly became limited again. It became boring not gonna lie. also, i can't even exit these ads anymore it's annoying.
買ってにDLされて アイコンが現れた。
